title: Practical Git and Debugging Workflows
summary: Improve productivity with professional Git usage and effective debugging strategies tailored for frontend development.
targetSkill: Familiarity with Git plus debugging and problem-solving skills
personalizationNote: Reinforce Git best practices and equip Sudarshan with advanced debugging techniques for complex frontend issues.
videoStyle: Terminal and IDE screen captures paired with explanations
learningObjectives: Using browser and editor tools effectively
knowledgeChecks: How do you handle a git merge conflict?
Which DevTools panel helps inspect React components?
What is the first step in debugging a new bug?
narrationScript:
Scene 1: Git Branching and Merging
Create branches for features to keep main stable. Pull requests let teammates review code. Conflicts happen when changes overlap; resolving them carefully keeps history clean.

Scene 2: Debugging JavaScript Frontends
Set breakpoints to pause script execution, inspect variables, and step through code. Use React DevTools to examine component trees and props.

Scene 3: Effective Problem-Solving Strategies
Start by reproducing bugs consistently. Narrow down to minimal failing code. Logs and error boundaries catch and report unexpected errors gracefully.

slides.title: Git Branching and Merging
slides.speakerNotes: Branching isolates work, and merge conflicts are common. We'll explore smooth workflows to collaborate without headaches.
slides.narration: Create branches for features to keep main stable. Pull requests let teammates review code. Conflicts happen when changes overlap; resolving them carefully keeps history clean.
slides.visualCue: Git commands demo and conflict editor screenshot.

slides.title: Debugging JavaScript Frontends
slides.speakerNotes: DevTools are your debugger’s best friend. Learn tips to trace bugs and performance lags in React and plain JS apps.
slides.narration: Set breakpoints to pause script execution, inspect variables, and step through code. Use React DevTools to examine component trees and props.
slides.visualCue: Chrome DevTools interface highlighting sources panel.

slides.title: Effective Problem-Solving Strategies
slides.speakerNotes: Good problem solving is methodical. We’ll cover approaches to identify and fix issues faster.
slides.narration: Start by reproducing bugs consistently. Narrow down to minimal failing code. Logs and error boundaries catch and report unexpected errors gracefully.
slides.visualCue: Flowchart of debugging process with example console logs.
